message:
fix: Remove invalid 'needs: build' references from CI workflow

The workflow referenced a non-existent 'build' job, causing all test
jobs to fail. Each job already builds independently.

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,6 @@
 name: CI
 
 on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
 
@@ -21,7 +19,6 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-core:
     name: CPython @core (286 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: build
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -40,7 +37,6 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-linux:
     name: CPython @linux (18 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: build
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -59,7 +55,6 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-macos:
     name: CPython @macos (33 tests)
     runs-on: macos-latest
-    needs: build
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -78,7 +73,6 @@ jobs:
   test-cpython-windows:
     name: CPython @windows (93 tests)
     runs-on: windows-latest
-    needs: build
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
